examples: Obesity correlates with increased risk for hypertension and stroke.
Those who are overweight or indulge in high-salt diets are candidates for hypertension.
Such is the stuff of hypertension and reckless driving.
When Bristol-Myers came out with its hypertension drug captopril, at least ten other companies copied it.
Witness hypertension drug Vasotec, which lost its protection last year and saw sales plunge.
